description: Network Solutions provides domain registration, website, hosting, ecommerce, email, and related online business services. It also operates reseller/partner tooling and legacy ecommerce capabilities documented for external integrations.
summary: Network Solutions exposes a public MCP endpoint with no auth, plus legacy documented HTTP APIs for ecommerce and reseller/domain partner integrations with publicly visible docs but no confirmed public auth mechanics or machine-readable specs.

surfaces.name: Network Solutions Partner Protocol XML API
